## Changelog

### New features

- Added support for _Profiles_.

### Changes

- Admin can now add, edit and delete profiles.
- Admin can now assign permissions for each user to access specific profiles.
- Profiles can now be used to upload different files via _Files Updater_ and to choose specific loaders for each profile.
- Added a `/api/profiles` endpoint to access profiles data.

### Bug fixes and improvements

- Fixed an critical issue in the file uploading process that could allow unauthorized to upload files to the server.
- Added migration scripts to update the database schema for the new profiles feature.
- Fixed various bugs and improved the overall stability of the application.
- Updated dependencies to ensure compatibility with the latest versions of Svelte and Vite.

## How to upgrade

### First-time setup

Please follow [this guide](https://emlproject.pages.dev/docs) to install EML AdminTool for the first time.

### Upgrading from a previous version

1. Log in to EML AdminTool as administrator.
2. Click on the "Settings" tab.
3. Scroll down to the "Update" section.
4. Click on the "Update" button and wait for the update to complete.

Please note that EML AdminTool will not be available during the update process. We recommend that you perform the update during off-peak hours to minimize disruption to your users.
